sources.source_name: Yahoo Finance historical quote for HUT

current_price.source: Yahoo Finance historical OHLC via yfinance ticker HUT

volume.source: Yahoo Finance historical OHLC via yfinance ticker HUT

source_report_turnover.source: StockLoop K-line decision report source row

technical_screen.layout_guidance: 先等回測支撐、突破續強或量縮沉澱後再評估
technical_screen.holding_guidance: 若已有持倉，維持小部位觀察，不在確認前放大風險
technical_screen.tracking_text: Legacy ZLSMA EMA20 趨勢策略：LZEMA20；收盤位置 21.6%；振幅 9.3%；buySources=LZEMA20；buyCount=1；entrySource=LZEMA20；entryReason=多方趨勢開始；buyCount 1；今日買點 LZEMA20；估算成交金額USD 448,761,613
technical_screen.risk_text: 未見硬性排除條件，仍需追蹤隔日量價與大盤風險

key_missing_inputs: latest filed income statement, balance sheet, and cash-flow statement not ingested for this batch run
normalized revenue, EBIT, tax, D&A, capex, working-capital, and FCF history not sourced
management guidance or consensus forecast path not sourced
filing-based diluted share count and net debt bridge not sourced
WACC build, terminal growth, and exit multiple assumptions not source-backed
dcf_valuation.valuation_note: DCF was not computed because the batch run did not ingest filing-based operating history, capital structure, forecasts, or WACC inputs. The workbook is a screen-grade evidence gap register, not a price target.

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0% pre-trigger; reassess after trigger and valuation evidence
portfolio_risk.risk_budget: 0.50% post-trigger risk budget; 0% before trigger confirmation
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: numeric downside not source-backed; source report references signal-day low or short moving average where applicable
portfolio_risk.liquidity_cap: requires ADV/participation analysis before sizing; source-report turnover and Yahoo volume are included as preliminary liquidity context
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: no hedge recommended at screen stage; use size-down/no-position until valuation and trigger evidence improve
portfolio_risk.add_rule: add only after source-backed valuation, fundamentals, and technical confirmation are all upgraded
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: trim or keep at zero if price extends without volume/valuation support or DCF remains not-decision-ready
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: remove from active candidate list if technical trigger fails or missing valuation evidence cannot be resolved
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: no model capital at risk before decision-ready valuation; conditional risk budget follows StockLoop batch defaults
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: daily price/volume review until trigger resolves; refresh valuation evidence before any model allocation

model_rules.sizing_formula: min(single-name cap, risk budget / downside_or_stop_distance, liquidity cap)
